title: Apex Closes Global Real Estate Fund VIII at $85 Billion
content: Apex Investment Group announced the final close of its Global Real Estate Fund VIII at $85 billion, exceeding the target of $80 billion. The fund attracted capital from 65 institutional investors including pension funds, sovereign wealth funds, and family offices. The capital will be deployed across core and core-plus real estate investments in North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific over a 5-year investment period.

title: Apex Value Realization Fund Achieves 14.2% Three-Year Return
content: Apex's Value Realization Fund delivered exceptional performance with a three-year gross return of 14.2%, outperforming benchmark indices by 320 basis points. The fund's portfolio of 35 mid-market companies achieved an average revenue growth of 22% CAGR, driven by operational improvements and strategic add-on acquisitions. This performance reflects the firm's disciplined approach to value creation.

title: Apex Expands Emerging Markets Platform with New $30 Billion Fund
content: Apex Investment Group launched Apex Emerging Markets Fund VI focused on growth equity investments in Asia, Latin America, and Eastern Europe. The fund has already secured $30 billion in commitments from global institutional investors. The fund targets companies in technology, consumer, and financial services sectors with growth potential exceeding 20% annually.

title: Apex Infrastructure Fund Acquires 18 Asset Platform Companies
content: Apex Global Infrastructure Fund II completed the acquisition of 18 platform companies including logistics centers, data facilities, and renewable energy assets across Europe and Asia Pacific. The platform portfolio now manages $40 billion in assets with diversified revenue streams. The acquisitions expand Apex's long-term yield and inflation-hedge offerings to institutional investors.

title: Apex Appoints Sarah Richardson as Chief Operating Officer
content: Apex announced the appointment of Sarah Richardson as President and Chief Operating Officer. Richardson brings 22 years of asset management leadership experience from major global PE firms. In her role, she will oversee firm operations, investor relations, and strategic partnerships as Apex continues to expand its platform and capabilities globally.
